insights.message: Moderate capital efficiency — ROE 15.0% in FY2025
High-margin business — Net Profit Margin 33.0% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 1.58x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 49.4% margin in FY2025
